title: Faster package installs with %uv pip in serverless notebooks
body:
You can now use the `%uv pip` magic command in serverless notebooks on environment version 5 or above as a faster alternative to `%pip` for Python package management. `%uv pip` is powered by the [uv](https://docs.astral.sh/uv/) package manager and shares the same notebook virtual environment as `%pip`.

See [Faster installs with `%uv pip`](/aws/en/libraries/notebooks-python-libraries#uv-pip).
